title: Paycheck Calculator - Free Salary to Take-Home Pay
description: Free paycheck calculator. Estimate your take-home pay after federal and state taxes, Social Security, and Medicare deductions.
keywords: paycheck calculator, take home pay calculator, salary after tax, net pay calculator, payroll calculator
intro: Estimate your take-home pay after taxes and deductions. Enter your gross salary and filing details to see your net pay.

faq.a: Take-home pay is your gross salary minus all deductions including federal tax, state tax, Social Security (6.2%), and Medicare (1.45%).
Federal income tax uses progressive brackets. Your income is taxed at increasing rates as it moves through each bracket.
FICA includes Social Security (6.2% up to $168,600 in 2024) and Medicare (1.45% on all earnings) taxes.
